source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
A number is to be written into every vertex of the 18 -sided shape so that it is equal to the sum of the two numbers from the adjacent vertices. Two of these numbers are given. Which number is written in vertex $A$?
<image1>
extraction_notes: 题目包含<image1>占位符，且求vertex A的数值明显依赖图形。

image_dependency: question asks for the value at vertex A on an 18-sided shape, so the location of A is diagram-dependent
the text says two numbers are given but does not specify which vertices they are on; those placements must be read from the image
image_manifest shows an available image and registry_passed=true
multi_step: solving requires propagating the recurrence 'each vertex equals the sum of the two adjacent vertices' across multiple vertices of an 18-sided polygon
the task combines visual identification of the marked vertices with algebraic/iterative reasoning over the polygon
this is not a direct lookup or single-step computation; at minimum it needs setup from the image plus repeated constraint use
question length and open numeric format suggest constructed reasoning rather than answer selection
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text is a single concrete value: 38
the vertex-sum rule provides explicit constraints that can in principle be checked against a reconstructed solution
the final answer is objective rather than subjective

risk_flags: exact verification depends on reading vertex positions from the image

decision_reasons: 核心资产完整：题干、图像和数值答案均存在，且 registry_passed=true
虽然题目强依赖图像定位已知顶点和A点，但所需图像资产已提供，不构成候选池阻塞
答案为明确数值，约束规则清晰，具备较好的可验证性
